Haus of Hadassah Writes

Stories that
live forever

Emotional fiction. Unforgettable love. Raw, honest storytelling.

Welcome to the world of Hadassah Rae Writes — where every story is a heartbeat, every character breathes, and every page leaves something permanent inside you.

Read My Stories About Me

About the Author

Hadassah
Ananaba

I am Hadassah Ananaba — founder of Haus of Hadassah Writes, a creative storyteller from Nigeria with a deep passion for emotional, character-driven fiction that reaches into the heart of the reader and refuses to let go.

My stories explore love in all its forms — the kind that is forbidden, the kind that survives impossibility, the kind that arrives when you are not looking and changes everything you thought you knew about yourself.

I write because I believe that every person deserves to see themselves in a story — to feel that their experiences, their pain, their love, and their strength are worth telling.

The Wrong Vow:
My Perfect Match

Paranormal Dark Romance · 18+

The Wrong Vow: My Perfect Match

She was sent as a pawn. She became a queen. A werewolf forced into a vampire lord's world — and the love story neither of them saw coming.

Nigerian Romance · Broken Love

Where Love Once Lived

A story about love that was real, loss that was devastating, and the long, painful, beautiful road back to yourself.
